title: Ability to Lock Column Descriptions Without Locking the Entire Column

posts.author: JodieCisne (Jodie Cisne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

I’d love to suggest an enhancement to the column permissions functionality. Right now, locking a column in Monday.com restricts editing of the entire column, including its values which is great in some cases.

However, it would be incredibly helpful if we could lock just the column description (the little info tooltip) while still allowing users to edit the column’s data. This would ensure that important instructions or context in the description stay consistent, without limiting users’ ability to work in the column itself.

This would be especially useful for shared boards across teams where guidance needs to stay visible but fixed.

Thanks for considering this!
